seo.title: Nevada Dental Assistant License (2026) | Requirements & Fees
seo.description: Complete guide to dental assistant licensing in Nevada — endorsement steps, fees, DANB certification, and radiography permits.
seo.keywords: dental assistant license nevada, dental assistant certification nevada, RDA nevada, DANB CDA nevada, dental assistant radiography nevada

board.name: Nevada State Board of Dental Examiners
board.mailing_address: 6010 S. Durango Drive, Suite 110, Las Vegas, NV 89113

license_types.title: Dental Assistant / EFDA
license_types.description: The primary credential for dental assistants in Nevada.

steps.title: Review Expanded Function Requirements
steps.description: Determine which specific expanded function certification (e.g., Radiology, Coronal Polishing, Restorative Functions) you wish to obtain and review its unique requirements on the Nevada State Board of Dental Examiners website, including coursework, experience, and examinations.

steps.title: Gather Supporting Documentation
steps.description: Collect all necessary documents, which may include official transcripts, certificates of completion for approved courses, proof of current CPR certification, and any other specific requirements for your chosen expanded function.

steps.title: Create Online Portal Account
steps.description: Register for an account on the Nevada State Board of Dental Examiners Online Services Portal if you do not already have one. You will need to provide personal information and verify your email address.

steps.title: Complete and Submit Application
steps.description: Log in to the Nevada State Board of Dental Examiners Online Services Portal, complete the Expanded Functions Dental Assistant Application, upload all required supporting documents, and pay the non-refundable application fee for each certification requested.

steps.title: Board Review and Approval
steps.description: After submitting your complete application and all required documentation, the Nevada State Board of Dental Examiners will review your submission. You will be notified of the Board's decision regarding your certification.

steps.title: Receive Certification
steps.description: Upon approval, your Expanded Functions Dental Assistant certification will be issued, allowing you to perform the approved procedures in Nevada.

documents.detail: Certificate from CODA-accredited program or documentation of on-the-job training hours.
Official CDA certification from the Dental Assisting National Board, if applicable.
Proof of radiography competency/certification required for taking x-rays.

provisional_text: Some states allow dental assistants to work under direct supervision while obtaining required certifications or completing training.
reciprocity_text: Dental assistants can apply for Dental Assistant / EFDA through the Nevada State Board of Dental Examiners by license.

faqs.question: Does Nevada require a dental assistant license?
faqs.answer: Yes, Nevada requires Dental Assistant / EFDA through the state board.

faqs.question: Is DANB certification recognized in Nevada?
faqs.answer: Yes, DANB CDA certification is recognized and often preferred by employers in Nevada.

faqs.question: Can I take dental x-rays in Nevada?
faqs.answer: Yes, but a radiography permit or certification is required.

faqs.question: How much does it cost to become a dental assistant in Nevada?
faqs.answer: State application fees are $200. Additional costs may include DANB CDA exam ($450), radiography certification, and background check fees.

reciprocity.notes: Dental assistants can apply for Dental Assistant / EFDA through the Nevada State Board of Dental Examiners by license.

hero.title: Become a Dental Assistant in Nevada
hero.dek: General dental assistants are not licensed in Nevada. To apply for specific Expanded Functions Dental Assistant certifications, applicants must use the Nevada State Board of Dental Examiners Online Services portal.

variants.label: Renewal

official_links.portal_name: Nevada State Board of Dental Examiners Online Services Portal
official_links.registration_steps: Navigate to the portal, click 'Register a Person or Business', provide your personal details including name, email, desired username, password, and security questions. Confirm your email address to activate your account.
